title: rhododendron coeloneurum
intro: Rhododendron coeloneurum is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to the Himalayas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rhododendron coeloneurum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimalarial activity. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
